ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transmission_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission line */,
  "line_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the transmission line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission line */,
  "line_description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the transmission line */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Capacity of the transmission line in megawatts */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transmission line (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "voltage_level" REAL /* Voltage level of the transmission line */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission line owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transmission line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transmission line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_data" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow data entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission line */,
  "datetime_beginning_utc" TEXT /* Start time of the data interval in UTC */,
  "datetime_beginning_ept" TEXT /* Start time of the data interval in Eastern Time (EPT) */,
  "datetime_ending_utc" TEXT /* End time of the data interval in UTC */,
  "datetime_ending_ept" TEXT /* End time of the data interval in Eastern Time (EPT) */,
  "actual_flow" REAL /* Actual flow during the data interval in megawatts */,
  "sched_flow" REAL /* Scheduled flow during the data interval in megawatts */,
  "inadv_flow" REAL /* Unanticipated flow during the data interval in megawatts */,
  "flow_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the flow (e.g., import, export) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flow data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flow data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transmission_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading transaction */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission line associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity_mwh" REAL /* Quantity of energy traded in megawatt-hours */,
  "price_per_mwh" REAL /* Price per megawatt-hour */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date of settlement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transmission_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market price entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission line */,
  "price_per_mwh" REAL /* Price per megawatt-hour */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the market price */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of the price (e.g., day-ahead, real-time) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the market price was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the market price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_prices_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transmission_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading contract */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission line associated with the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the contract (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "quantity_mwh" REAL /* Quantity of energy in megawatt-hours */,
  "price_per_mwh" REAL /* Price per megawatt-hour */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contract was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_contracts_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transmission_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading party (e.g., buyer, seller) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trading party */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the trading party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trading party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trading party was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trading party was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_parties" (
  "transaction_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction-party link */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading transaction */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading party */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trading party in the transaction (e.g., buyer, seller) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES trading_parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_parties_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES trading_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_parties" (
  "contract_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract-party link */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading contract */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading party */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trading party in the contract (e.g., buyer, seller) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_parties_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES trading_contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES trading_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or operation */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the access occurred */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., transmission line, transaction, contract) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of the operation (e.g., login, logout, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
